field.title: Брони
field.formula:

ELSE

END

field.title: CRQ
field.formula:
IF sum([qual]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / SUM([is_lead])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([qual_kx7w]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead_vzab]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_kx7w]) / SUM([is_lead_vzab])
END
